text.value: What is the CHV's first name?
Briefly explain the problem that needs help from CHMT
Cannot select "No support needed" and another option.
From what you have observed from this CHV, does a CHV need more support from:
Briefly explain the problem that needs help from the supervisor
Briefly explain the problem that needs help from Technology Team

As a CHV, you are responsible for making sure that you are providing the community with health education and services while trying to take precautions to stop the transmission of Corona virus to one another. Therefore, make sure you consider the following while you conduct the visits: • Wash your hands with soap/sanitizer as many time as you can while at home, once you are at the client's house and when you leave. • Keep a 2 meters distance while talking to your clients. • Don't shake hands with your clients. • Avoid group gatherings. • Provide the service at the open space and if it should be inside, make sure the windows and doors are open. • Cover your mouth with a towel or elbow when you sneeze or cough. • Do not go for a visit if you have symptoms of fever, cough or frequent sneezing.
Precautionary measures when visiting a client
Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user
Is able to navigate in the application, submit forms, and sync data ?
Is able to check their balances (data, minutes, mobile money) ?
Does not have bango kitita/Play & Communication Activity Guide
Does use job aids effectively (Bango Kitita, Play & Communication Activity Guide) ?
Does regularly turn data on and off as needed for syncing ?
Is able to charge phone and solar charger (if applicable) ?
Is able to identify boundaries of his/her catchment area ?
Does network with and communicate with others in the community (shehas, wajumbe, others) ?
Is on track to meet household enrollment targets ?
Is able to answer questions from the client and able to know when to defer to a health facility or to their respective supervisor ?
Does ask for consent from family before registering or enrolling ?
Is able to introduce themselves, the program, and their role ?
Does hold a fluent conversation with the client, engage interactively, and listen attentively?
Ni lipi jina la kwanza la CHV?
Ni lipi jina la babu yake?
Ni lipi jina la baba yake?
Eleza kwa ufupi tatizo la CHV linalohitaji msaada kutoka kwa CHMT
Huwez kuchaguwa "Hahitaji msaada" na chaguo jengine
Kutokana na ulichogundua kwa CHV, unadhani CHV anahitaji msaada kutoka kwa:
Eleza kwa ufupi tatizo la CHV linalohitaji msaada kutoka kwa supervisor
Eleza kwa ufupi tatizo la CHV linalohitaji msaada kutoka kwa timu ya teknolojia

Kama mhudumu wa afya ya jamii, una jukumu la kuhakikisha unatoa elimu ya afya ya jamii na huduma huku ukijikinga ili kuepusha kusambaa kwa maambukizi ya korona kutoka kwa mtu mmoja kwenda kwa mwengine. Hivyo hakikisha unazingatia yafuatayo wakati ukiwa unatoa huduma: • Osha mikono yako kwa maji na sabuni au kutumia vitakasa mikono mara nyingi kadiri unavyoweza ukiwa nyumbani kwako,nyumbani kwa mteja wako na pindi ukimaliza kutoa huduma. • Hakikisha kuna umbali wa mita mbili kati yako na mteja wako unayeenda kumtembelea • Pindi ukiongea na wateja wako , usishikane mikono. • Epuka mikusanyiko. • Toa huduma katika maeneo yaliyo wazi na ikitokea ukafanya ndani hakikisha milango na madirisha yanakuwa wazi. • Funika mdomo wako kwa kitambaa au kiwiko unavyooenda chafya au kukohoa. • Tafadhali usiende kutoa huduma ukijihisi na dalili za homa na kukohoa na kwenda chafya kwa wingi.
Hatua za kuchukua pindi unapoenda kumtembelea mteja wako
Je, anaweza kutumia mfumo wa simu, kutuma fomu na taarifa ?
Je, anaweza kuangalia salio (interneti, dakika, huduma za simu za fedha) ?
Hana bango kitita / muongozo wa mawasiliano na michezo
Je, anatumia vitendea kazi vizuri (Bango Kitita, muongozo wa mawasiliano na michezo) ?
Je, anawasha data na kuzima kama inavyohitajika wakati wa kutuma taarifa ?
Je, anaweza kutumia simu janja vizuri ?
Je, anaweza kuchaji simu na chaji za sola (ikiwa mtu anatumia chaji ya sola) ?
Je, anaweza kuyatambua maeneo ya mipaka yake ya kazi ?
Je, anashirikiana na kuwasiliana na wengine kwenye jamii kama vile masheha,wajumbe na wengine ?
Je, anajitahidi kufikia idadi ya kaya anazotakiwa kusajili ?
Je, anaweza kujibu shaka na maswali ya wateja na ana uwezo wa kuwapa rufaa kwenda kituo cha afya au kwa msimamizi ?
Je, anaomba ridhaa kutoka kwa familia kabla ya kuisajili ?
Je, anaweza kujitambulisha, kuutambulisha mradi na majukumu yake ?
Je, anazungumza kwa ufasaha na mteja, anafuatilia vizuri na kumsikiliza mteja kama inavyopaswa ?
